timingNormalization.note: Upload strict comparable mode: explicit left/right upload usage and submit cadence (copy-dst-copy-src, submitEvery=1). Left repeat/divisor stay explicit for Doe-side normalization; right divisor remains 1.0 unless explicitly contracted otherwise.
